name: Mattermost OIDC Bridge
description: Production-ready OIDC connector for Mattermost with Keycloak-first defaults and hardened security controls.

settings_schema.header: Define how Mattermost discovers, authenticates, and provisions users through your OIDC provider.
settings_schema.footer: Never enable "Allow Insecure Issuer" outside disposable dev or QA environments.

settings.help_text: Paste the exact issuer/realm URL reported by your IdP discovery document (e.g. https://keycloak.example.com/realms/master).
Temporarily permit http:// issuers for local testing (not for self-signed certificates).
Client identifier configured for Mattermost inside your provider.
Confidential client secret issued by your provider for the client above.
Callback URL you registered with the provider. It must exactly match the client configuration.
Space- or comma-separated scopes requested during authorization (include roles if you map admin roles).
